description_long: This is a mid-century modern style shelving unit with an asymmetrical, geometric design. The frame is constructed from wood and painted in a teal blue color, featuring visible wood grain texture. The shelving surfaces and interior compartments are finished in a contrasting warm, light wood tone. The unit includes multiple open shelves of varying sizes, supported by slender metallic rods, and two large open compartments at the base and left side. The legs are short and tapered, giving the piece a slightly elevated stance. The overall design is visually dynamic, making it suitable for use as a display or storage unit in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or public lounges.
description: A teal blue, asymmetrical wooden shelving unit with light wood shelves and open compartments, supported by metal rods and short tapered legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing all open shelves, compartments, and the full geometric design.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and angled profile, with shelves and rods visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid teal back and the open right-side compartment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the angled structure and the thickness of the frame.
